name: Silly Connolly Announce
info:
Generate a quip and announce it on speakers in specified areas.

Inputs:
- msg.prompt: Text describing what to quip about
- msg.areas: Array of area names (empty = all areas)
- msg.announcement: Backup message if generation fails

name: Build Quip Request
Extract Quip
Build TTS
Check TTS
Concat Audio
Resolve Areas → Players
Build Kearney Fallback
